entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Clusters 103/105/106/107/110 Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 15, 04:00 UTC  -  Jun 16, 21:50 UTC

Jun 4, 20:21 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer on clusters 103/105/106/107/110 in GRA region.

Start time : 15/06/2026 04:00 UTC
End time : 16/06/2026 21:50 UTC

List of concerned Filerz:

15/06/26 22:00 UTC:
- filerz350 cluster105
- filerz390 cluster107
- filerz654 cluster110
- filerz742 cluster106
- filerz875 cluster103
- filerz877 cluster103

16/06/26 06:00 UTC
- filerz393 cluster107
- filerz657 cluster110
- filerz743 cluster106
- filerz745 cluster106
- filerz879 cluster103
- filerz880 cluster103

16/06/26 22:00 UTC
- filerz394 cluster107
- filerz663 cluster110
- filerz746 cluster106
- filerz747 cluster106
- filerz881 cluster103
- filerz882 cluster103

Service impact : We will be migrating the various Filerz servers to keep our infrastructure up to date and more stable, thereby preventing further service interruptions. The Filerz servers will be unavailable for 30 minutes on the scheduled migration date.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be performing maintenance on the Web Hosting infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Web Hosting]- Web Hosting Incident Notification
entry.content:
Jun 11, 13:04 UTC
Identified - We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Web Hosting offer.

Start time : 11/06/2026 11:39 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Mail Delivery Operations
Customers Impact : Customers may face slowness on mail delivery.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

Jun 11, 12:17 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Wen Hosting offering, which is causing temporary latency issue in the MX Plan and Zimbra solutions.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 11/06/2026 11:39 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Mail Delivery Operations
Customers Impact : Customers may face slowness on mail delivery.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Filerz2186 Cluster100 Incident Notification
entry.content:
Jun 11, 11:21 UTC
Resolved - Service has been fully restored since 11/06/2026 09:30 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 11/06/2026 09:10 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The Filerz2186 experienced significant latency, resulting in degraded performance.
Customers Impact : Customers experienced slower response times and service instability.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 11, 09:54 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary functionality issue on Filerz2186 Cluster100 in GRA region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 11/06/2026 09:10 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The Filerz2186 is experiencing significant latency, resulting in degraded performance.
Customers Impact : Customers experience slower response times and service instability.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Filerz327 Cluster105 Incident Notification

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Domains] - Domains Name incident notification on .TL
entry.content:
Jun 11, 07:13 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our our .TL Domains offering has been resolved.

Start time : 28/05/2026 14:00 UTC
End time : 11/06/2026 07:07 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 28, 15:06 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the incident affecting our .TL Domains offer, customers in the impacted zone are unable to perform some tasks on .TL domains.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 28/05/2026 14:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Multiple operations (Registration, Renew, Transfer, Restore, Delete) are temporarily unavailable for .TL domains.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to perform specified operations on .TL domains.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilized to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Cluster 100 Filerz2186 Incident notification
entry.content:
Jun 11, 07:00 UTC

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 11/06/2026 06:16 UTC
End time : 11/06/2026 06:36 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The Filerz2186 experienced significant latency, resulting in degraded performance.
Customers Impact : Customers experienced slower response times and service instability.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan incident notification
entry.content:
Jun 5, 09:10 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering has been resolved.

Start time : 07/05/2026 14:00 UTC
End time : 01/06/2026 18:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by our provider.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 25, 09:03 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : The incident is still under investigation.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams and our provider are currently investigating the incident to determine its origin and implement a fix.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 11, 14:56 UTC
Update - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering for MX Plan, which is causing temporary availability issue in the GLOBAL region to Microsoft domains (outlook.com, live.com and hotmail.com) and Cloudflare domains.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 07/05/2026 14:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : MX Plan delivery outgoing mails to Microsoft domains (outlook.com, live.com and hotmail.com) and Cloudflare domains is temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers using MX Plan are temporarily unable to send mails to Microsoft accounts (Outlook, Live, Hotmail) and Cloudflare accounts.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 11, 14:51 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an event affecting our Collaborative solutions offer.

Our teams are fully committed to investigating this issue and working towards a resolution as soon as possible. As investigations are ongoing, we will share any new findings or updates with you as soon as possible.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
